Important Support Updates

Hey Everyone, we're going to be implementing a deadline to receive support on a couple things:

• If you traded Claim Stakes in the secondary markets and had issues with the Claim Stake distribution
• Year of the Tigu skins airdrop  

If you think you haven't properly received either of the above, please ⁠No Access  BEFORE February 17th 8:00 PM UTC.
